//: Focused design-system gate (2026-07-13 audit): the token system exists and is now fully adopted for COLOR. `color-no-hex` is ENFORCED (error) — every raw hex was migrated to a --k-* token; index.css is the ONE place raw hexes live (that's where tokens are defined). The raw-px spacing rule stays advisory (warning): the remaining px are deliberate Figma-exact pixel-art coordinates on a pixel-perfect port + mixed shorthands, which must be tuned by hand, not force-snapped. Flip it to error once those are reviewed case-by-case.

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: Use an 8px spacing token (--k-1 … --k-15) instead of a raw px value
